title: Owner-directed all-files commit window
body: Owner has directed this session to run handoff and commit ALL current dirty files in logical groups regardless of commit queue. I have already announced the window once; a fresh active claim has appeared, so I am re-announcing before staging. This may include the current context-cost tokenizer files and collaboration state. I will stop after all current files are committed, live claims/queue/tree are reported, and the opener is produced.
